name: pi-experiences
description: A Pi extension package for capturing and reviewing behavioral experience patterns separately from skills and memory.

scripts.check: npm run check:agent-experience && npm run check:cli
scripts.check:agent-experience: node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase1.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase2-storage.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase3-capture.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase4a-consolidation.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase4b-model-output.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase5-review.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase6-selector.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase7a-selector-adapter.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase7b8.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase9-setup-analyze.mjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check && npm run build
scripts.check:cli: npm run build && node ./dist/experience-consolidate.mjs --help >/dev/null && node ./dist/experience-consolidate.mjs status >/dev/null
